name: Shari Lewis's No-Fry Latkes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups russet potatoes, peeled and shredded (about 3 medium potatoes)
A few grinds of black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large bowl, thoroughly mix all ingredients until combined.
3. Coat two baking sheets with oil spray.
4. Drop 1/4-cup portions of batter onto the prepared sheets.
5. Press each latke down gently with the palm of your hand.
6. Bake for 15 minutes.
7. Turn latkes and bake an additional 10 minutes, or until browned all over but not blackened at the edges.
8. Serve with applesauce or sour cream.
Makes: approximately 14 latkes
